text:
Edmond Jail (エドモンド・ジェル, Edomondo Jeru) is the end game boss from the video game Hunter × Hunter: Phantom of Greed Island. Hunter × Hunter: Phantom of Greed Island 

Appearance

Edmond has flamingo-pink skin, a long, thrushy, and scraggly white beard and hair, and is in the final stages of male pattern baldness. He dresses in mustard-colored clothing and has several thin red tubes inserted throughout his upper body. 

Personality

Edmond possesses a game-master mindset. He is egotistical, sadistically playful, and relentlessly manipulative, treating people as pawns in his elaborate scheme. With no regard for morality, he deliberately tampers with memories and takes pleasure in toying with his victims. Though self-aware, he is unnervingly resilient—accepting setbacks, never admitting true defeat, and always ready to reset and start anew. 

Plot

Phantom of Greed Island

At some point in the past, Edmond was a business owner who lost his company to bankruptcy. This event led him to create a separate Greed Island where he lures in Nen users and reduces them to pawns by altering their memories. Here, he plays both the role of a game-master and a final adversary, storing his main body within the 10th basement floor of the Central Horn dungeon. And upon his defeat, he refuses to concede, vowing instead to reset and rebuild his system anew. 

Abilities and Powers

Nen

Edmond is a Conjurer who was capable of single-handedly creating a separate Greed Island with numerous creatures and dungeons. He also demonstrates a certain level of Manipulation mastery, being capable of tampering with and erasing the memories of other Nen users.
